positive: A stylized, symmetrical composition featuring a pair of celestial-themed hummingbirds perched on a crystalline branch. The hummingbirds are rendered with vibrant, contrasting jewel tones—electric blue, emerald green, and sapphire—outlined in bold, clean vector lines. The background is a deep cosmic indigo and violet nebula, contrasted by glowing golden constellations and geometric star patterns. The style is a blend of Art Nouveau elegance and modern geometric folk art, highly detailed but maintaining clear, non-blended silhouettes for apparel printing. Central focus, high contrast, ethereal glow, vector illustration, perfect symmetry, digital painting, --ar 1:1
